reason: ISS-2346 flags the §2.13 subsection headline metaphor 'treating it as 1.67 nT/µGal is treating 1/0 as a finite number' as technically attackable. ISS says the actual argument is about the coupling constant's denominator being contradicted by the dome's own high-precision data. Fixing this requires understanding the specific argument at §2.13 (the magnetic gradient analysis, WIN-029 adjacent) and writing a technically accurate replacement that doesn't use the 1/0 metaphor. This is scientific-precision judgment beyond baby's mandate.
